title: Commit and push PR 17 Cursor fix
objective: On branch claude/tender-darwin, create a commit for the Cursor backend fix in PR 17 and push it to origin so the PR is updated.
instructions: Work in the PR worktree at /Users/yashturkar/Workspace/control-tower/.claude/worktrees/tender-darwin on branch claude/tender-darwin.
Stage and commit only the intentional fix in src/control_tower/backends.py and tests/test_bootstrap.py.
Do not include unrelated .control-tower runtime drift, out.json, or src/control_tower.egg-info in the commit.
Push claude/tender-darwin to origin after the local commit succeeds.
Report the new commit hash, push status, and any leftover untracked or modified files.
constraints: Do not force-push or rewrite history.
Do not modify product code beyond minimal Git-adjacent work required for the commit.
expected_outputs: ResultPacket with commit hash, pushed branch/ref, and any residual workspace dirt.
definition_of_done: The PR branch includes the Cursor fix commit.
The branch is pushed to origin.
Unrelated transient files remain excluded and are explicitly listed.
